overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves along wet sidewalks past towering buildings with holographic advertisements, under elevated highways, and through intersections with moderate vehicle and pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon billboards and concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a concrete stair structure

notable_agents.action: person in orange jacket standing near the street railing

entered.detail: tall vertical billboard displaying rainbow gradient colors and advertisements
elevated concrete structure with stairs and blue accent lighting
large elevated highway structure spanning across the street ahead
tall modern building with illuminated windows and glass facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk at night, with the camera moving forward past a concrete stair structure on the right. A vibrant rainbow neon billboard dominates the left side of the frame, while an elevated highway overpass looms ahead. Sparse pedestrians and occasional vehicles populate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching elevated highway overpass with large digital displays

events.description: entering the shadow of the elevated highway overpass, reducing ambient light

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the overpass, passing other pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying Kerry Eurodyne advertisement with pink neon accents
modern glass building with reflective surfaces and interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the elevated highway overpass, entering its shadow around the 20-second mark. The Kerry Eurodyne billboard becomes prominent ahead, while the rainbow billboard and concrete stairs recede behind. Moderate pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction, and vehicles pass on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway approaching intersection

events.description: waiting at red traffic light as vehicles pass through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection under the overpass, slowing for traffic signals

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red light
marked pedestrian crossing lines visible under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Now under the elevated highway, the scene becomes semi-covered with artificial lighting dominating. The camera approaches an intersection with a red traffic light, waiting as a yellow taxi passes. The Kerry Eurodyne billboard remains visible overhead while the crosswalk ahead comes into view.

events.description: turning left to cross the street at the intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk, turning left under the highway overpass

entered.detail: bright yellow zebra crossing lines on the wet asphalt
massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway structure
large illuminated advertising murals on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to cross the intersection, moving from the semi-covered sidewalk onto the open crosswalk with bright yellow lines. The Kerry Eurodyne billboard and glass building recede as the view opens to the intersection, with highway support columns now on the left and wall murals appearing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with advertising murals

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the highway overpass alongside the wall murals

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: the underside of the elevated highway with structural beams and lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a narrow enclosed walkway directly under the elevated highway. The wall murals on the right become prominent features at close range, while the traffic lights and intersection fade behind. The space is fully sheltered with artificial lighting illuminating the concrete walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a neon-lit city sidewalk that transitions from an open street into the sheltered shadow of an elevated highway. It begins by passing a concrete stair structure on the right, guided by the glow of a vibrant rainbow billboard on the left. As the camera advances, the rainbow lights recede and the scene shifts toward a prominent Kerry Eurodyne billboard while the looming overpass begins to cast a deep shadow over the path. The environment then becomes semi-covered under the highway, where artificial lighting takes over and the camera slows toward a city intersection. Finally, the movement pauses at a red traffic light, watching a yellow taxi pass by as the crosswalk opens up ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, neon-lit city intersection into a sheltered urban underpass. It begins as the camera turns left to cross the street, moving from a semi-covered sidewalk onto a crosswalk marked with bright yellow lines. As the view opens, the Kerry Eurodyne billboard and glass buildings recede into the distance, replaced by massive highway support columns on the left and colorful wall murals on the right. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the open intersection behind, moving directly under the elevated highway into a narrow, enclosed walkway. Finally, the space becomes fully sheltered, with the surrounding murals appearing at close range under the glow of artificial lighting.
